result.stdout:
Description:
  SqlHydra.Cli

Usage:
  SqlHydra.Cli <provider> [options]

Arguments:
  <provider>  The database provider id: 'mssql', 'npgsql', 'sqlite', 'mysql', or 'oracle'

Options:
  -?, -h, --help            Show help and usage information
  --version                 Show version information
  -t, --toml-file           The toml configuration filename. Default: 'sqlhydra-{provider}.toml' []
  -p, --project             The project file to update. If not configured, the first .fsproj found in the run directory will be used. []
  -cs, --connection-string  The DB connection string to use. This will override the connection string in the toml file. []
